full_text:
Sima Zhou (Zijiang) 司馬伷 (子將)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Zhou (司馬伷), styledZijiang (子將). Led the force to which Sun Hao offered his seal and surrendered. Sima Zhou was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Sima Zhou lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
